name: DICK'S SPORTING GOODS, INC.
business: DICK'S SPORTING GOODS, INC. is a leading global sports retailer offering an assortment of authentic sports equipment, apparel, footwear and accessories under banners including DICK'S Sporting Goods, Golf Galaxy, Public Lands, Going Going Gone!, and Foot Locker (including Foot Locker, Kids Foot Locker, Champs Sports, WSS, and atmos). It also owns and operates GameChanger, a youth sports mobile platform for live streaming, scheduling, communications and scorekeeping.

exposures.sentence: We have a strong digital presence that drives engagement through our eCommerce sites and mobile apps.
The retail industry is undergoing continued technological innovation and disruption including increased use of artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning.
cyber threats continue to evolve rapidly accelerated by emerging technologies such as advanced artificial intelligence and machine learning.

catalysts.event: Open approximately 14 DICK'S House of Sport locations in 2026
catalysts.sentence: We plan to open approximately 14 DICK S House of Sport locations in 2026.

catalysts.event: Open approximately 22 DICK'S Field House store locations in 2026
catalysts.sentence: We plan to open approximately 22 DICK S Field House store locations in 2026.

catalysts.event: Open approximately 15 Golf Galaxy Performance Centers in 2026
catalysts.sentence: We plan to open approximately 15 in 2026.

catalysts.event: Expand Fast Break initiative to approximately 250 locations ahead of back-to-school season 2026
catalysts.sentence: We plan to invest in the Foot Locker Business as we look to rapidly expand the Fast Break store initiative in 2026, with the goal to have approximately 250 locations ahead of the back-to-school season.
